feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Spanish EC Sales and Purchase List reporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working with the Run Statutory Reports application to generate the "Spanish EC Sales and Purchase List". When reviewing the Manage Tax Items phase, I notice that the system displays all posted invoices, regardless of whether they are intra‑EU transactions or not.

However, when I check the tax report data model analyzer, it correctly shows only the intra‑EU invoices, which is the expected behavior for this report.

My question is: Why does the “Manage Tax Items” phase not filter only intra‑EU transactions and instead shows all invoices, while the tax report model applies the correct? 

Any guidance or shared experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Navigation from Notifications to My Inbox - Expert view
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have a question about the following topic. The users in our system should use the App My Inbox to access their open Tasks that they recieve from workflows. Because of custom attributes we wanted to display in the Inbox, we decided that all users should use the App My Inbox in the Expert Mode. 
The problem is, that if a user gets a notification for an open task on his homepage and then clicks on the bell and then on the task, the Task gets opened in the "normal" My Inbox App. 
My question is, are we able to change the App that opens when you click on a notfication from the normal Inbox to the Inbox in the expert mode ? And if so how ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Why are Business Partner roles split into Procurement vs Finance (Supplier/Customer)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question about Business Partner master data in SAP (BP approach). When creating a Supplier or Customer, I see that the roles are split into separate areas, for example:

  • Supplier – Procurement / Purchasing (FLCU01) ,(FLVN01)

  • Supplier – Finance / Financial Accounting (FLVN00), (FLCU00),
    (and similarly for Customer)

From what I observed:

  • If I assign the Procurement role, the system expects/needs the Finance role as well (which makes sense, because purchasing usually ends with invoicing and payment).

  • But I can assign the Finance role without assigning the Procurement role.

My questions:

  1. What is the business logic / real-life use case for having a Supplier/Customer with Finance-only role (no Procurement/Sales role)? In which scenarios would a company want this?

  2. Why did SAP design it as two separate roles instead of having one combined role that includes both procurement + finance, with optional sections/fields?

entry.title: Tax Reform Case
entry.content:
Question: To comply with the tax reform, two tax types (BR08 and BR09) were created to be assigned to the business partner.

 

The question is whether this information is only necessary to send the data to the calculation engine or if SAP uses it for any other purpose?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Display the attachedment directly in the web browser
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like the attached file in the PR line item to open and display directly in the web browser when clicked, instead of being downloaded. Is this possible?

Regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Integration of vendor e-invoices in Accounts Payabe in S4Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have implemented DRC for Belgium in S/4hana public cloud. In the app for manage electronic invoices, we receive the incoming invoices in xml and html format. How can we integrate these vendor invoices into our Account Payable

entry.title: Is it supported to map a master‑data custom field into the payment data / outgoing payment file?
entry.content:
We would like to confirm the following at a high level for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

  1. Feasibility
    Is it supported to map a master‑data custom field (e.g., on Supplier) into the payment data / outgoing payment file?

  2. If supported, are these steps correct?
    a) Add the “append” field to the payment data source
    App: Create Payment Medium Formats (CBC) → Including Custom Reference Fields (e.g., ZREFxx)
    b) Populate the appended field with logic
    App: Custom Fields and Logic (implement BAdI “Payment Medium: Custom Additional Reference Fields” / Event 06)
    c) Map the appended field to the DMEE‑equivalent format mapping
    App: Map Format Data for Payments (and assign the mapping in Deviating Format Tree, if applicable)

entry.title: How to Auto Assign Check Number in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am facing an issue, i am on public cloud, i have created check lot using fiori app Manage Checkbook  and I have tried everything to create payment through check, but system is not auto assigning check number.

Your help will be appreciated.

BR

Muhammad Yousuf Ali

SAP FICO Consultant

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / MDG - How to Mass Import Data into existing Business Partners
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have a few questions about the ability to add new fieldvalues for existing business partners in mass. 
From my research so far the simplified process should work as follows:

1. Export the resprective Business Partners, with the relevant tables and fields (App: F6551A)

2. Add an additional entry (new row) with the needed values into the downloaded Exel-File 

3. Depending on the change, insert an appropiate ACTION CODE in the Action Code column. 

4. Upload the file again and start the consolidation process (App: F6553A and App: F6556A)

My questions are the following:

1. Is this functionality even in scope for the basic/free MDG Version in SAP Public Cloud 2602 ?

2. If i want to add a value for a specific table and field, should i export the complete business partner or just this table/field ? Or is there an other best practice for what tables/fields to use for the export/import ?
So far both ways havent been successfull for me, because i get a variety of errors, including that certain tables need to be included in the upload or that some fields are missing and need to be filled etc.

3. What Action Codes are available in the Public Cloud MDG ? So far i found out that, there is I - Insert; C- Copy and D - Deletion. 
Are there more ?

4. I have encountered multiple tables, where i get an error that the Action Code I is not allowed for this tabel. Does SAP provide information about what Action Code is allowed for what table/field or is this just try and error ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: India Withholding Tax (TDS/TCS) Status Report - India Price Category Issue
entry.content:
When this app is assigned to users, they are able to view the report only; no transactional or update actions are available.

Additionally, since the report is display only, why it is classified as Advanced? If Write Access is set to No Access, the report does not open at all, even though users only require view access.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Clarification Needed on SAP User Locking and Deactivation Policy in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I would like to request clarification on the SAP user blocking/locking and deactivation process followed in current setup.

Could you please provide guidance on the following points:

  1. Automatic Blocking Due to Inactivity
    After how long of no login activity is a user automatically blocked/locked in SAP?
  2. Deactivation After Blocking
    Is there a subsequent deactivation step after a user is blocked?
    • If yes, does this follow IT policy?
    • Is any confirmation or approval required before deactivation?
  3. User Notifications
    Are users notified in advance before their account is blocked or deactivated?

This information will help us provide accurate support to users experiencing access issues.

entry.title: check is not getting assigned in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am using fiori app Post Outgoing Payment in public cloud, how can we auto assign check in public cloud, i-e i am in starter system, though i have created check lot for house bank, i have tried Automatic Payment app, but check is not getting assigned in any case.

How can i do so?

BR

Muhammad Yousuf Ali

entry.title: PR/PO costing duplicated to CC and WBS
entry.content:
The issue we are currently experiencing is Purchase Orders holding WBS elements and Cost Centers, yet Purchase Requisitions do not allow both real WBS elements and Cost Centers.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fiori changed value to appear when deleting table entry
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, I have a custom app using RAP that has Gross Amount field.

I  wanted to make the Gross Amount value updated whenever I change the Unit Price in the Conditions Table.

Gross Amount is part of one entity while the Conditions Table is another.

When I add a new entry and enter a Unit Price value, the Gross Amount value updates. But when I delete an entry having a Unit Price, the Gross Amount doesnt update.

I've already applied side effects and determinations in my behavior definition to trigger calculation during delete and reflect changes in the Gross Amount. I checked the draft table and the Gross Amount is updated but the value doesnt change in the UI. 

determination CalcGrossAmtByDelete on modify { delete; }  
side effects
  {
    field UnitPrice
    affects
        field _Entity1.GrossAmount;

    $self
    affects
        field _Entity1.GrossAmount;
  }

entry.title: Year-End or Mid-Year Valuation Not Permitted for Vendor or Customer in Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content:
When executing Foreign Currency Valuation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the system raises an error stating that Year-End or Mid-Year Valuation is not permitted for the selected valuation area when Vendor or Customer open items are included in the run.

The Year-End and Mid-Year indicators are visible in the job parameters. However, activating them together with Vendor or Customer valuation results in an error. The business requirement is to perform year-end foreign currency valuation for open items without an automatic reversal in the following fiscal period.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Activate scope item 4GR for 3SL conversion
entry.content:
Hello,

For now, our S4 hana cloud public solution runs on a 2SL lanscape, and we will soon move to a 3SL solution. Therefore, SAP asks for scope item 4GR to be activated first.
Could someone explain the reason why this scope item is necessary to fulfill the conversion ? Is 4GR more than a "simple" business process ? Are there some technical blocks deployed when this scope item is activated that comply with à 3SL architecture and ensure a successful migration?

Thank

entry.title: Sales Kits processing using third-party item categories
entry.content:
Good day! I'm requesting for assistance regarding Sales Order for Sales Kits 31Q.

Based on the scope item process, it appears to be limited to standard sales order processing. May I ask if it is also possible to create a sales order where a sales kit can generate a purchase requisition?

During our testing, we observed that third-party item categories are not available when using sales kits upon sales order creation. We would appreciate your guidance on whether this scenario is supported and, if so, what configuration may be required.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP to Microsoft Excel Integration for trial balance
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We are trying to Integrate between SAP to Microsoft Excel for trial balance report. For this we followed the below mention SAP blog, but we unable to get the trial balance API to integrate to Microsoft Excel. Can you please suggest the trial balance API and steps to integrate to Microsoft Excel.

S/4HANA Cloud Integration | Microsoft Excel - SAP Community

Regards

Sandeep

entry.title: 3ZB Billing Cost across affiliated companies document exchange is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working on the 3ZB and have completed the set up following the instructions, unfortunately the documents are not being exchanged when we create the purchase order, we do not get the corresponding sales order created. Purchase order status stays as "Not yet sent" and we see no message in the logs. We followed the script for the 3ZB set up instruction as well.

entry.title: Requirement Date in Subcontracting Component SAP S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I have a question about why the system is using a date from 4 days ago as the Requirement Date in my Subcontracting Components?

I have understood and verified that my delivery date is calculated from my info record, as you can see.

 

 

 

 

But if we look at the subcontract component, the system indicates a Requirement Date  4 days ago, why is this happening?

In the master data of my component I do not have any planned delivery time I have deleted and created an info record for 17 days and the system still calculates 4 days ago.

 

But if I manually move the delivery date, the system automatically adjusts it by approximately 7 days.
I've read note 2176766 - Requirement date (re)calculation logic in subcontracting, but I don't understand the calculation logic.
I look forward to your comments.
Thank you very much.
